title: Unibos 15L Glavnised Vintage Style Metal Tapered Dustbins & Lids - Galvanised 37cm (H) x 27cm (Dia)
features: DURABLE GALVANIZED METAL CONSTRUCTION: Built to last, this trash bin is made from premium galvanized steel, providing excellent resistance to rust, corrosion, and wear, even in outdoor conditions.
COMPACT 15L CAPACITY: Ideal for small spaces, the 15-liter capacity is perfect for kitchens, bathrooms, offices, or garden areas, offering a convenient and space-saving waste disposal solution.
SECURE FITTING LID: The bin comes with a secure fitting lid to keep odors contained and pests out, making it an ideal choice for both indoor and outdoor use.
VERSATILE USAGE: This multi-purpose dustbin can be used as a kitchen bin, garden waste bin, or even a decorative indoor dustbin, adding a touch of industrial charm to any space.
EASY TO CLEAN AND MAINTAIN: The smooth, galvanized surface ensures that the bin is easy to clean, requiring minimal maintenance to keep it looking new.
description: Keep your spaces tidy and organized with the Galvanised Trash Bin Mini 15L, a versatile and durable waste solution designed to meet all your disposal needs. Whether you're looking for a compact dustbin for your kitchen, garden, or indoor space, this 15-liter bin offers both functionality and style. Made from high-quality galvanized metal, this small yet sturdy bin is resistant to rust and corrosion, ensuring long-lasting use in any environment.
